statement.en: Prospects of Russian practical theology: spiritual experience of schema-archmandrite Sofroniy (Sakharov)
statement.summary: The article deals with the spiritual experience of Schema-Archmandrite Sofroniy (Sakharov) and discusses certain issues in his theology. The main features of Schema-Archmandrite Sofroniy’s worldview are the use of tradition as a foundation, a link with the present day and a deep personalistic theology based on Scripture and Church Fathers. Revd. Sofroniy’s theology is rooted in the two patristic topics, i.e. man as God’s image and Trinity as the icon of mankind. These topics are quite relevant today and are increasing their signifi cance. Revd. Sofroniy was a preacher of Orthodoxy to the Western world, whose values are man-centred and sometimes antichristian. Revd. Sofroniy’s legacy is still relevant in the situation of blurred and unsteady axiology of the present day. Revd. Sofroniy raise

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a scholarly survey and interpretive analysis of theological thought, not a testable empirical claim or formal proposition. The value of Sofroniy's theological legacy is hermeneutical and contextual rather than truth-evaluable in classical logic. The work functions as meta-commentary on spiritual tradition.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 伝統と聖書の積が現代で割られるとき、人間と三位一体の像が現れる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 三つの光が深い円に包まれ、その下に根が伸びる——過去と現在と超越の構造。
